customlist.name: Companion Prompt Status
customlist.aidescription: Lifecycle status of a companion prompt extension record. Active prompts are visible in the Crafted Companion Library and available for AI execution. Draft and Testing prompts are hidden from end users.

customvalue.aidescription: Prompt is live and visible in the Crafted Companion Library. Available for AI execution via getPromptMeta. Shown to all users with appropriate role access.
Prompt is under development. Hidden from the Companion Library and not available for AI execution. Only visible to administrators in the extension record list.
Prompt is retired and no longer recommended. Hidden from the Companion Library. Extension record preserved for audit trail. May be reactivated if needed.
Prompt is in QA validation. Hidden from the Companion Library but available for AI execution via direct getPromptMeta call for testing purposes.
